criteria.name: Cleaning Config
criteria.evidence: docs/cleaning-config.json now matches spec: value_ranges corrected (air_temperature_c [-50,60], relative_humidity_pct [0,105]), FWI output ranges use null upper bounds, enforcement.actions has all 5 entries (out_of_range, fwi_out_of_range, cross_variable, rate_of_change, flatline), cross_variable_checks.rain_rh_correlation has enabled/rule/variables/threshold_rh fields.

criteria.name: enforce_quality() Function
criteria.evidence: quality.py now uses _get_enforcement_action() helper to read per-check-type actions from config. All check functions (_check_value_ranges, _check_rate_of_change, _check_cross_variable, _check_flatline) and enforce_fwi_outputs() consult config for action. set_nan action actually modifies values; flag_only only flags.

criteria.name: Pipeline Integration
criteria.evidence: cleaning.py now imports enforce_quality, enforce_fwi_outputs, truncate_date_range from quality.py. Pipeline calls truncate_date_range() then enforce_quality() before impute, per spec insertion point: load → dedup → resample → enforce_quality → impute → FWI.

criteria.name: FWI Output Enforcement
criteria.evidence: cleaning.py calls enforce_fwi_outputs(hourly, quality_config) after calculate_fwi(hourly). enforce_fwi_outputs() now handles null upper bounds correctly (only checks lower bound when hi is None).

criteria.name: Quality Enforcement Report
criteria.evidence: cleaning.py writes quality_enforcement_report.csv from all_quality_actions after pipeline completes. Report written to data/processed/quality_enforcement_report.csv with columns station, timestamp_utc, check_type, variable, original_value, action, rule.

criteria.name: Manifest Registration
criteria.evidence: cleaning.py registers quality_enforcement_report in pipeline_manifest.json with type, path, rows, and timestamp. Deduplicates by type before appending.

criteria.name: Quality Flags Column
criteria.evidence: enforce_quality() correctly adds _quality_flags column as JSON-encoded string of flag arrays. All quality flag tests pass.

criteria.name: QA/QC Report Enhancement
criteria.evidence: qa_qc.py was not modified in this commit. QA/QC report still lacks quality_enforced_count, quality_flagged_count, out_of_range_pre_enforcement, and out_of_range_post_enforcement columns.

criteria.name: Date Range Truncation
criteria.evidence: truncate_date_range() is called in cleaning.py pipeline after loading and before quality enforcement. Records before 2023-04-01 are excluded.

criteria.name: Fast Test Suite Passes
criteria.evidence: 4 test failures in test_quality_enforcement.py, all Martin test-design bugs: (1) test_clean_data_passes_through_unchanged: sample_hourly fixture uses 24 identical values for all 3 flatline-monitored variables, triggering flatline; (2) test_flatline_does_not_modify_values: wind_speed_kmh has 15 elements vs 8-row DataFrame (ValueError); (3) test_flatline_action_is_flagged: asserts action=='flagged' but config-driven action is 'flag_only'; (4) test_flatline_with_nan_gap: NaN gap only in temperature but RH/wind have 7 identical values triggering flatline.

criteria.name: No Out-of-Range FWI Inputs
criteria.evidence: enforce_quality() is now called before impute in the pipeline. Out-of-range values are set to NaN before reaching calculate_fwi().

criteria.name: Flatline Detection
criteria.evidence: Flatline detection uses config-driven flag_only action. Does not modify values, only adds quality flags. NaN gaps correctly reset run_length.

failing_nodes.message: QA/QC report not enhanced with quality enforcement columns (quality_enforced_count, quality_flagged_count, out_of_range_pre_enforcement, out_of_range_post_enforcement). AC-DQ-8. Ralph should add these columns to generate_qa_qc_report().

Martin test-design bug: sample_hourly fixture uses 24 identical values for air_temperature_c, relative_humidity_pct, and wind_speed_kmh. Flatline threshold is 6 hours, so all 3 variables trigger flatline. Fixture needs variation in at least some values so clean data passes through unchanged.
Martin test-design bug: wind_speed_kmh list has 15 elements but DataFrame has 8 rows (periods=8). Causes ValueError: All arrays must be of the same length.
Martin test-design bug: test asserts action=='flagged' but the config-driven flatline action is 'flag_only'. Test needs to assert 'flag_only' to match config.

Martin test-design bug: test_flatline_with_nan_gap puts NaN gap only in air_temperature_c (3+NaN+3=7, below threshold 6) but relative_humidity_pct and wind_speed_kmh have 7 identical values each, exceeding threshold. All 3 flatline variables need the NaN gap.

summary: Ralph fixed 8 of 10 previously failing criteria. Config now matches spec, quality.py uses config-driven enforcement actions, all three quality functions are wired into the pipeline, report generation and manifest registration work. Remaining issues: (1) AC-DQ-8 FAIL — qa_qc.py not enhanced with enforcement count columns, Ralph should add them; (2) AC-DQ-10 FAIL — 4 Martin test-design bugs (fixture constant values triggering flatline, wrong list length, wrong action string assertion, incomplete NaN gap). Martin needs to fix these test bugs.
